description.ko: 네온의 광채가 디지털 개척지의 그림자와 미래형 대도시의 끊임없는 맥박을 밝히는 첨단 기술의 도시 전경을 탐험해보세요.
description.en: Explore a high-tech cityscape where the glow of neon illuminates the shadows of a digital frontier and the relentless pulse of a futuristic metropolis.

prompt: Cinematic shot of a sprawling cyberpunk city, NEON-V aesthetic, futuristic skyscrapers with massive holographic advertisements, rain-slicked streets reflecting vibrant neon pink and cyan lights, flying vehicles weaving through dense urban architecture, hyper-detailed, 8k resolution, volumetric lighting, synthwave atmosphere.
